Ignition Hand #TEST001 TBL#99999 HOLDEM No Limit - 2026-01-01 00:00:00
Seat 1: Dealer ($10 in chips)
Seat 2: Big Blind [ME] ($10 in chips)
Dealer : Set dealer [1]
Dealer : Small blind $0.10
Big Blind [ME] : Big blind $0.25
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealer : Card dealt to a spot [9h 9s]
Big Blind [ME] : Card dealt to a spot [Ah Kd]
Dealer : Raises $0.90 to $1
Big Blind [ME] : Calls $0.75
*** FLOP *** [2c 5d 8h]
Big Blind [ME] : Checks
Dealer : Bets $2
Big Blind [ME] : Calls $2
*** TURN *** [2c 5d 8h] [Tc]
Big Blind [ME] : All-in $7
Dealer : Calls $7
*** RIVER *** [2c 5d 8h Tc] [3s]
Dealer : Showdown [9h 9s 9s Tc 8h] (One pair)
Big Blind [ME] : Mucks [Ah Kd] (High Card)
Dealer : Hand result $19.90
*** SUMMARY ***
Total Pot($20)
Board [2c 5d 8h Tc 3s]
